title: SΔϕ-10 - Interpretation, Learning, and Inference as a Single Re-entry Structure
package_title: SΔϕ-10 - Interpretation, Learning, and Inference as a Single Re-entry Structure: Marker Re-entry, Residual Integration, and Transition-Law Update AI-Readable Package
creator: Sofience
type: AI-readable package / working paper / interpretation-learning-inference re-entry audit module
core_claim: Interpretation, learning, and inference are temporal modes of one marker re-entry structure.

primary_formulae.core: Interpretation, Learning, and Inference = temporal modes of one re-entry structure
primary_formulae.learning: Learning = persistent re-entry that updates transition law
primary_formulae.inference: Inference = projection from current transition law before next contact
primary_formulae.pipeline: Marker/DeltaPhi -> H_min Interpretation -> Projection/Inference -> Realized Transition -> Error/Boundary Residual -> Re-entry -> Transition Law Update -> Next Projection

do_not_use_as: proof that feedback always improves the system
